title: cordyline balmoreana
intro: Cordyline balmoreana, also known as Red Fountain Cordyline, is a type of evergreen plant native to New Zealand. It is valued for its striking red-purple foliage and ability to thrive in a range of environments. The plant's rhizome has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Traditionally, the rhizome is prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its health benefits, which include reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
